scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @notelab/toolkit && npm run build --workspace @notelab/toolkit-vercel
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @notelab/toolkit && npm run typecheck --workspace @notelab/toolkit && npm run typecheck --workspace @notelab/toolkit-vercel
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @notelab/toolkit && npm run test --workspace @notelab/toolkit-vercel
